name: preload-pip
description: Download conan pip wheels and upload to packagerepo

steps.command: docker run --rm debian:sid sh -c "apt-get update -qq && apt-get install -y -qq python3 python3-pip python3-venv >/dev/null 2>&1 && python3 -m venv /tmp/venv && /tmp/venv/bin/pip download conan=={opt.conan-ver} -d /tmp/pip-wheels >/dev/null 2>&1 && tar czf /tmp/pip-wheels.tar.gz -C /tmp pip-wheels && cat /tmp/pip-wheels.tar.gz" > /tmp/pip-conan-{opt.conan-ver}.tar.gz
